sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Shield, Lock, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Key, Clock } from 'lucide-react'; import PlatformLayout from '../components/platform/PlatformLayout'; import { adminSecurityLog } from '../data/mockData'; export default function AdminSecurity() { const securityStatus = [ { name: 'SSL Certificate', status: 'Valid', expiry: '2027-03-15', icon: Lock }, { name: 'Two-Factor Auth', status: 'Enabled', coverage: '98%', icon: Shield }, { name: 'API Keys', status: 'Monitored', keyCount: 42, icon: Key }, { name: 'Data Encryption', status: 'AES-256', coverage: '100%', icon: Lock }, ]; const threats = [ { id: 1, type: 'Brute Force Attempt', severity: 'High', count: 3, lastSeen: '2 hours ago', action: 'Blocked' }, { id: 2, type: 'Suspicious API Activity', severity: 'Medium', count: 1, lastSeen: '5 hours ago', action: 'Monitored' }, { id: 3, type: 'Rate Limit Exceeded', severity: 'Low', count: 8, lastSeen: '30 minutes ago', action: 'Throttled' }, ]; const getSeverityColor = (severity) => { switch (severity) { case 'High': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700'; case 'Medium': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700'; case 'Low': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700'; default: return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700'; } }; return (
{/* Header */}

Security & Compliance

Monitor platform security, threats, and audit logs

{/* Security Status Overview */}
{securityStatus.map((item) => { const Icon = item.icon; return (

{item.name}

{item.status}

{item.expiry &&

Expires: {item.expiry}

} {item.coverage &&

Coverage: {item.coverage}

} {item.keyCount &&

Active: {item.keyCount}

}
); })}
{/* Active Threats */}

Active Security Alerts

{threats.map((threat) => (

{threat.type}

{threat.count} incidents detected

Last seen: {threat.lastSeen}

{threat.severity} {threat.action}
))}
{/* Compliance Info */}

Compliance Status

GDPR
CCPA
SOC 2 Type II
ISO 27001

Data Protection

Backup Status Good

Last backup: 1 hour ago

Encryption AES-256

All data encrypted in transit & at rest

DLP Status Active

Data Loss Prevention enabled

Security Score

94/100

Excellent security posture

✓ All critical patches applied

✓ No active vulnerabilities

✓ Compliance up-to-date

{/* Audit Log */}

Audit Log

All platform security events and administrative actions

{adminSecurityLog.map((log) => ( ))}
Timestamp Action User IP Address Status Details
{log.timestamp} {log.action} {log.user} {log.ip} {log.status} {log.details || '-'}
); }
